prompt: Write a Python function named min_cut_certificate(n, edges, source, sink). edges is a list of tuples (u, v, capacity) describing a directed network with integer capacities and 0 <= u,v < n. Return a tuple (max_flow, source_side) where max_flow is the exact maximum s-t flow value and source_side is the sorted list of vertices reachable from source in the final residual graph after a correct max-flow computation. Requirements: handle parallel edges, zero-capacity edges, disconnected vertices, and n up to at least 40. Use only the Python standard library. Output only a single Python code block.
